title: Day 7 Speaking Drill — Had
instructions: Speak each sentence aloud clearly. Record yourself if possible. Focus on pronunciation and natural rhythm.

sentences.hindi: हमारे पास एक बड़ा घर था।

sentences.english: They had a lot of money.
sentences.pronunciation: They HAD a LOT of money.

sentences.hindi: उसके पास एक अच्छी नौकरी थी।
वे पहले ही खत्म कर चुके थे।

sentences.english: He had gone before I arrived.
sentences.hindi: वह मेरे आने से पहले चला गया था।
sentences.pronunciation: He had GONE be-FORE I ar-RIVED.

sentences.hindi: हमने प्रोजेक्ट पूरा कर लिया था।

pairs.question: Did you have a car?
pairs.answer: Yes, I had a car. / No, I didn't have a car.

pairs.question: Had you eaten before the meeting?
pairs.answer: Yes, I had eaten. / No, I hadn't eaten.

pairs.question: Did she have experience?
pairs.answer: Yes, she had five years of experience.

pairs.question: Had the team finished the work?
Did they have a plan?
pairs.answer: Yes, they had a clear plan.

drills.title: Story Time — Speak the Full Story
drills.story: Last year, I had a small car. I had a job in a big company. The company had 500 employees. One day, when I reached the office, my boss had already called a meeting. By the time I entered the conference room, everyone had taken their seats. The manager told us that the team had completed the project on time. It was great news! We had worked very hard for three months.
keyPoints: Had for possession: I had a car, I had a job
Had + V3 for earlier events: had called, had taken, had completed

drills.title: Rapid Fire — Say Quickly
sentences: She had had a hard day.
They had had a meeting before I had arrived.
We had had so many problems that we had almost given up.
drills.note: Notice 'had had' — this is correct English! First 'had' is Past Perfect auxiliary, second 'had' is the main verb (to have).

scenarios.situation: Reporting to your boss about yesterday
scenarios.you: I had a meeting with the client yesterday. They had some concerns about the project. By the time I spoke to them, I had already reviewed the report.
scenarios.boss: Had the team finished the analysis?
scenarios.you_reply: Yes, they had completed it by 5 PM.

scenarios.situation: Team discussion about a past problem
scenarios.colleague: Did you know about the issue before?
scenarios.you: Yes, I had noticed it last week. But by the time I reported, the team had already solved it.
scenarios.colleague: Great! We had a similar problem last year too.

sentences.english: If I had studied harder, I would have passed.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैंने ज़्यादा पढ़ा होता, मैं पास हो जाता।

sentences.english: I wish I had known about this earlier.
sentences.hindi: काश मुझे यह पहले पता होता।

sentences.english: If she had applied, she would have got the job.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसने आवेदन किया होता, नौकरी मिल जाती।

sentences.english: I wish we had more time.
sentences.hindi: काश हमारे पास ज़्यादा समय होता।

sentences.english: If he had listened, the mistake wouldn't have happened.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसने सुना होता, गलती नहीं होती।
